name: rlang-think
description: Think in RLang — structured reasoning language for AI agents. 6x token compression on internal reasoning.

interface.shortDescription: Think in RLang. Structured reasoning. 6x fewer tokens.
interface.longDescription: Replaces verbose English chain-of-thought with RLang — a Rust-inspired structured reasoning language. Four mandatory phases (Frame/Explore/Verify/Decide), typed confidence, evidence chains. Works as Claude Code plugin and agent-agnostic skill.
defaultPrompt: Use RLang for all internal reasoning. Structure thinking into Frame/Explore/Verify/Decide phases.
